zh.lifeSummary: 當Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod於1475年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾登維根時，他的父親William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief60歲，母親Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean11472歲。他於1498年6月28日與Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾哈里斯享年72歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭Comhairle nan Eilean Siar武特 賀布利德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod于1475年出生在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾登維根时，他的父亲William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief60岁，母亲Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean11472岁。他于1498年6月28日与Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年在苏格兰音巴內-爾哈里斯享年72岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰Comhairle nan Eilean Siar武特 賀布利德斯。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Alisdair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered spelling of Alasdair, the Scottish Gaelic form of Alexander . Alexander has long been a popular name in Scotland, having been borne by three medieval kings of the country. Alistair is now widely used in the English-speaking world, often by those without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Alister
meanings: Altered spelling of Alasdair, the Scottish Gaelic form of Alexander . Alexander has long been a popular name in Scotland, having been borne by three medieval kings of the country. Alistair is now widely used in the English-speaking world, often by those without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Alaster
meanings: Altered spelling of Alasdair, the Scottish Gaelic form of Alexander . Alexander has long been a popular name in Scotland, having been borne by three medieval kings of the country. Alistair is now widely used in the English-speaking world, often by those without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Allaster
meanings: variant spelling of   Alistair .  It is borne, for example, by a minstrel in  Sir Walter Scott's  Rob Roy (  1818 ), which ensured its 19th-century popularity.

variants.name: Crouch
meanings: English (southeastern): from Middle English crouch(e), cruch(e) ‘cross’ (Old English crūc, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem; the Old English crūc was replaced in Middle English by the word cross, from Old Norse kross), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a cross.

en.lifeSummary: When Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod was born in 1475, in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief, was 60 and his mother, Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean, was 11472. He married Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel on 28 June 1498, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1547, in Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Outer Hebrides, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod est né en 1475, à Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean, avait 11472 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel le 28 juin 1498, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1547, à Harris, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Outer Hebrides, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod 1475 in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief 60 und seine Mutter Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean 11472. Er hat am 28. Juni 1498 in Scotland Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1547 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Outer Hebrides, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeodが1475年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアダンベガンで生まれた時，父William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chiefは60歳，母Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLeanは11472歳であった。1498年6月28日にスコットランドでLady Margaret Cameron of Lochielと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアハーリスで72歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドComhairle nan Eilean Siarオウター ヘブリズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod(이)가 1475년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 던베건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean(은)는 11472세였다. 그는 1498년 6월 28일 스컷랜드에서 Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 해리스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 우터 브라이데스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod nasceu em 1475, em Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean, tinha 11472 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel em 28 de junho de 1498, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1547, em Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Outer Hebrides, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod родился в 1475 г. в местности дунвеган, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean, 11472. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel 28 июня 1498 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1547 г. в местности харрис, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности оутир хебридесь, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod nació en 1475, en Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean, tenía 11472 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel el 28 de junio de 1498, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1547, en Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Outer Hebrides, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escocia, Reino Unido.
